title: Comte and Cheese Gluten-Free Savory Wraps
description: A simple and delicious recipe for savory wraps filled with Comte and cheese, perfect for a quick snack or meal.
instructions: Preheat a panini press or grill to medium-high heat.
Lay a gluten-free wrap on a flat surface and spread a tablespoon of savory spread on it.
Place 2 slices of Comte cheese on one half of the wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle shredded cheese over the Comte cheese.
Fold the other half of the wrap over the filling to create a half-moon shape.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 3 more wraps.
Place the wraps in the preheated panini press or grill and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the wrap is crispy.
